title: Task Definition Schema v4
description: JSON Schema for task frontmatter. v4 flat format (name + optional description) or legacy v2 nested format (task + responsavel). See SQUAD_PROTOCOL_V4.md §7.

name.description: kebab-case task identifier. Tasks do NOT have owners in v4; workflows bind agents to tasks.

target_words.description: Optional [min, max] word-count range for the deliverable produced by this task. Read by the deterministic volume-bounds gate. When absent, the gate is skipped for this task. See ~/.claude/skills/_shared/lib/volume-bounds.js.

word_target.description: Optional single-point word target. Used with `tolerance` (default ±20%) when no `target_words` range is given. Mutually exclusive with target_words.

tolerance.description: Tolerance fraction for word_target (e.g. 0.20 = ±20%). Ignored when target_words range is present.

required_sections.description: Optional list of header names the deliverable must contain. Read by structure-bounds gate; case- and accent-insensitive substring match. See ~/.claude/skills/_shared/lib/structure-bounds.js.

oneOf.title: Legacy v2 Nested Format
oneOf.description: Legacy v2 format with owner coupling. Deprecated in v4.
